action: Use execute_windows_command to click into the editor pane and type (or paste) the minimal CLI calculator code (+, –, *, /).
fallback_action: Notify the user if entering or pasting the code fails in the future.

recipe.steps: Click into the editor pane of the opened file in VS Code, and type or paste in the minimal Python CLI calculator code that supports +, -, *, and / operations.
